summary: Small live multi-section practical benchmark for transition contrast and cross-section target fidelity.

scenarios.name: intro-to-chorus-tree-contrast
scenarios.analyzePrompt: Analyze the current song for sections, beat windows, phrase cues, and energy shifts.
scenarios.prompt: Keep PorchTree calm and warm in the Intro with broad steady wash coverage, then let SpiralTrees clearly take over in Chorus 1 with flowing spiral motion. Preserve readable contrast between the two sections rather than using one generic look across both.

scenarios.name: verse-to-chorus-border-escalation
scenarios.analyzePrompt: Analyze the current song for sections, beat windows, phrase cues, and energy shifts.
scenarios.prompt: Use Border_Segments as a clean segmented bars read in Verse 1, then escalate them into an obvious marquee-band chase in Chorus 2. Keep the chorus visibly more assertive than the verse.

scenarios.name: bridge-to-finalchorus-radial-shift
scenarios.analyzePrompt: Analyze the current song for sections, beat windows, phrase cues, and energy shifts.
scenarios.prompt: Keep Spinners restrained and texture-led in the Bridge with a softer twinkle feel, then shift to a clear radial spin on Star in the Final Chorus. The Final Chorus should read as the stronger visual payoff.
